title: Crown of Salt - Manifest Matrix - GLOBAL_BROADCAST Shard Card
prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Create shard card for holder GLOBAL_BROADCAST. Content brief: Broadcast map provides route geometry needed to validate the sequence.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.
negativePrompt: No logos, no unreadable text overlays, no cartoon style, no low-resolution blur, no gore excess, no meme aesthetics.
